steps.title: Identify the subject and number
steps.content: The subject is “Light of Truth” (one sculpture—singular), and the blank requires a verb form that agrees with it.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
Subject-verb agreement requires the verb to match its subject's number, and “stands” is the singular form needed. The other choices use plural verbs or past tense, both of which violate this rule.
That is the correct answer.
